R. 557 (t.) f4-4* 4-9-1991 (4) RT. 1FT. 14. 4. . 564 ( f.) frgiv 7-7-1994 -- 2 of 3 -- [sr : 11---fror 3(i)] arcs *T 77746 xtantrytt 3 MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Department of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th October, 1994 G.S.R. 756(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) read with clauses (d), (e) and (f) of sub-section (2) of section 35 and clause (c) of section 36 of the Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Central Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1987, namely :- 1. (1) These rules may be called the Central Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Second Amendment Rules, 19,4. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Central Administrative Tribunal (Procedure) Rules, 1987, -- (a) rule 3 shall be re-numbered as sub-rule (1) thereof ; (b) in sub-rule (1) as so re-numbered, in the second proviso, — (i) in clause (a), the portion "However, the final order shall be in English" shall be omitted ; (ii) after clause (b), the follwoing clause shall be inserted, namely :- "(c) the Benches located in "Region A" as defined in clause (f) of rule 2 of the Official Languages (Use for Officials purposes of the Union) Rules, 1976 may, in their discretion, make final orders either in Hindi or in English." (c) after sub-rule (1) as so re-numbered, the following sub-rule shall be inserted, namely :— "(2) Notwithstanding anything contained in sub-rule (1), where a final order is made in Hindi, an authenticated English translation thereof shall simultaneously be prepared and kept on record." [No. I-4201213;92-AT (Vol. IV)] SMT. SARITA PRASAD, Jt. Secy. (AT) Foot Note :—The Principal Rules were published in the Gazette of India vide notification number GSR 17(E), dated 6-1-1987 and subsequently amended vide :— (i) No. GSR 1000 (E), dated 11-10-1988. (ii) No. GSR 99 (E), dated 26-2-1991. (iii) No. GSR 557 (E), dated 4-9-1991. (iv) No. GSR 564 (E), dated 7-7-1994. Printed by the Manager, Govt. of India Press. Ring Road, Maya Puri. New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054, 1994 -- 3 of 3 --
